html:
The Pick/Axe is a craftable Item found in the Ancient Tab. It requires 1 Luxury Axe, 1 Opulent Pickaxe and 2 Thulecite, and an Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft. It also has a 5% or 50% chance to be found inside an Ornate Chest or a Large Ornate Chest respectively. Like all items from the Ancient Tab, Pick/Axes cannot be prototyped and Characters always need to be near an Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft them again.

The Pick/Axe can be used as both a Pickaxe and an Axe, but takes 20% fewer swings to accomplish the same work. A Large Evergreen takes 12 swings instead of 15, a standard Boulder 5 hits instead of 6. The game only counts whole swings, not fractional ones, so without other bonuses, only items that take 5 swings or more will benefit.

Each chopping use will reduce its durability by 0.25%, mining by 0.75%. When used exclusively to chop or mine it has double the durability of the 2x Luxury Axe (800) or 2x Opulent Pickaxe (267). The 20% bonus makes the Pick/Axe the fastest pick usable by all characters. The Pick/Axe saves inventory space by combining the two tools and by eliminating the need to carry flint or gold to craft them when they break.


Tips

  • The Luxury Axe and Opulent Pickaxe used in the recipe can be in any condition without affecting the durability of the resulting Pick/Axe.
  • When a Pick/Axe is low on durability, players can use a Deconstruction Staff to get both the Luxury Axe and Opulent Pickaxe back each at 100% durability, plus one thulecite.
  • In , Thulecite is only renewable via Seed Of Ruin or World Hop. Even though they take a second inventory slot and mine 20% slower, Opulent Pickaxes and Luxury Axes may be a better bargain because Gold Nuggets and Twigs are so much easier to acquire.
  • The Pick/Axe is the fastest mining tool that is usable by all characters, but the Obsidian Axe chops trees several times faster.

Trivia

  • The Pick/Axe used to be called "Multitool" and had a different look before being implemented with the Stuff of Nightmares update.

Gallery

  • Wolfgang holding a Pick/Axe.
  • Woodie cutting a tree using the Pick/Axe.
  • Woodie mining using the Pick/Axe.
  • Pick/Axe's previous design, before it was released.
  • Wilson chopping a tree with the old version of the Pick/Axe.
  • Wilson mining with the old version of the Pick/Axe.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

"multitool_axe_pickaxe"
“It's brilliant!”
–Wilson
“It's so useful!”
–Willow
“Chop and dig! I can do that all day.”
–Wolfgang
“An item with multiple uses.”
–Wendy
“A PRACTICAL TOOL”
–WX-78
“Quite functional, it operates as both an axe and a pickaxe.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's... it's beautiful.”
–Woodie
“I don't know why I didn't think of this.”
–Maxwell
“A revelation! Two tools have been merged into one!”
–Wagstaff
“A warriör tööl!”
–Wigfrid
“Double duty.”
–Webber
“I'm picky when it comes to tools.”
–Walani
“Oh, I get it! Kind of like a spork!”
–Warly
“'Tis multipurpose.”
–Woodlegs
“IS'T INCONSTANT TOOL.”
–Wilba
“Handy Stick.”
–Wormwood
“Frees up some pocket space.”
–Wheeler
“That's really not my forte.”
–Winona
“It couldn't decide which to be, so it became both.”
–Wortox
“That pretty smart, florp.”
–Wurt
“It's two tools in one!”
–Walter
“This will save me precious time!”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cuốc/Rìu là một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Cổ. Nó cần 1 Rìu Cao Cấp, 1 Cuốc Sang Trọng và 2 Thulecite, và Trạm Giả Khoa Học Cổ Đại để chế tạo. Nó cũng có 5% hoặc 50% cơ hội được tìm thấy bên trong Rương trang trí công phu hoặc Rương trang trí công phu lớn. Giống như tất cả các vật phẩm từ Thẻ Cổ, Cuốc/Rìu không thể được tạo nguyên mẫu và Nhân vật luôn cần ở gần Trạm Giả khoa học Cổ đại để chế tạo lại chúng.

Kind of like a spork! |woodlegs = 'Tis multipurpose. |wilba = IS'T INCONSTANT TOOL. |wormwood = Handy Stick. |wheeler = Frees up some pocket space. |winona = That's really not my forte. |wortox = It couldn't decide which to be, so it became both. |wurt = That pretty smart, florp. |walter = It's two tools in one! |wanda = This will save me precious time! |choose = woodie}} The '''Pick/Axe''' is a craftable [[Items|Item]] found in the [[Ancient Tab]]. It requires 1 [[Luxury Axe]], 1 [[Opulent Pickaxe]] and 2 [[Thulecite]], and an [[Ancient Pseudoscience Station]] to craft. It also has a 5% or 50% chance to be found inside an [[Ornate Chest]] or a Large Ornate Chest respectively. Like all items from the Ancient Tab, Pick/Axes cannot be prototyped and [[Characters]] always need to be near an Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft them again. The Pick/Axe can be used as both a Pickaxe and an Axe, but takes 20% fewer swings to accomplish the same work. A Large [[Evergreen]] takes 12 swings instead of 15, a standard [[Boulder]] 5 hits instead of 6. The game only counts whole swings, not fractional ones, so without other bonuses, only items that take 5 swings or more will benefit. Each chopping use will reduce its durability by 0.25%, mining by 0.75%. When used exclusively to chop or mine it has double the durability of the 2x Luxury Axe (800) or 2x Opulent Pickaxe (267). The 20% bonus makes the Pick/Axe the fastest pick usable by all characters. The Pick/Axe saves inventory space by combining the two tools and by eliminating the need to carry flint or gold to craft them when they break. __NOTOC__ == {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * The Luxury Axe and Opulent Pickaxe used in the recipe can be in any [[Durability|condition]] without affecting the durability of the resulting Pick/Axe. * When a Pick/Axe is low on durability, players can use a [[Deconstruction Staff]] to get both the Luxury Axe and Opulent Pickaxe back each at 100% durability, plus one thulecite. * In {{DS}}, Thulecite is only renewable via [[Seed of Ruin|Seed Of Ruin]] or [[Teleportato|World Hop]]. Even though they take a second inventory slot and mine 20% slower, [[Opulent Pickaxe|Opulent Pickaxes]] and [[Luxury Axe|Luxury Axes]] may be a better bargain because [[Gold Nugget]]s and [[Twigs]] are so much easier to acquire. * The Pick/Axe is the fastest mining tool that is usable by all characters, but the [[Obsidian Axe]] chops trees several times faster. == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The Pick/Axe used to be called "Multitool" and had a different look before being implemented with the ''[[Version History#August 20.2C 2013 - The Stuff of Nightmares|Stuff of Nightmares]]'' update. == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == PickSlashAxe In-Game.png|[[Wolfgang]] holding a Pick/Axe.
